name: readytech-site
description: ReadyTech website for secure networking, managed VPN, private cloud, backup internet, monitoring, and restaurant technology services.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run sales:test
scripts.check:syntax: node -c server.js && node -c routes/quotes.js && node -c routes/sales.js && node -c services/estimate-engine.js && node -c services/sales-recommendation-engine.js && node -c services/email-service.js && node -c services/sales-auth.js && node -c services/sales-email-service.js && node -c services/turnstile-service.js && node -c public/js/main.js && node -c public/js/quote-intake.js && node -c public/js/sales-coach.js && node -c public/js/lead-tracking.js && node -c scripts/run-migration.js && node -c scripts/test-sales-coach.js
